title: VINA'S FREE THRIFT STORE - 211info
text: VINA MOSES CENTER VINA'S FREE THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides clothing and shoes including interview-ready clothes, food, home goods, kitchenware (pots, pans, dish sets), and hygiene items. Workforce closet available with work boots and shoes, rain and safety gear. Shopping allowed once per month. Exceptions made for special circumstances. Accepts donations of food, clothing, bedding, linens, kitchenware, toys and games, and hygiene supplies. 968 NW Garfield Avenue Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: -Thrift Store: Monday/Wednesday 1pm-3pm, Tuesday/Thursday 10am-noon and 1pm-3pm, 1st Saturday of the month noon-3pm -Donations: Visit website for current hours Email (541) 753-1420 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 753-1420 Main phone Main phone (541) 753-1420 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Benton, Linn, and Lincoln Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Front entrance on Garfield Avenue (ramp access) with public parking on the street Corvallis Transit System bus stops nearby Services: Bedding/Linen Bedding/Linen Donation Programs Clothing Donation Programs Food Donation Programs General Clothing Provision Kitchenware Donation Programs Personal/Grooming Supplies Personal/Grooming Supplies Donation Programs Shoes Small Kitchen Appliances Toy/Game Donation Programs Work Clothing Other Services Offered At This Location: MATERIAL GOODS - VINA'S CLOSET TEMPORARY FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE - VINA'S AID If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. VINA MOSES CENTER
